channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Lake blames Gallego for border woes, he vows to protect abortion rights in Arizona Senate debate
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Republican Senate candidate Kari Lake repeatedly reminded viewers Wednesday of her three-decade career on Arizona television, looking to harness the intimate connection she built with voters and overcome Democrat Ruben Gallego's portrayal of her as a liar in the only debate of the clo
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER and GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What to know about Hurricane Milton as it slams Florida's Gulf Coast
item.description: Hurricane Milton slammed into Florida as a Category 3 storm Wednesday, bringing powerful winds, heavy rain and tornadoes to much of the Gulf Coast, including communities already battered by deadly Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: More than 1.5 million without power as Hurricane Milton slams Florida, causes deaths and flooding
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Hurricane Milton crashed into Florida as a Category 3 storm Wednesday, pounding the coast with ferocious winds of over 100 mph (160 kph), heavy rain and producing a series of tornadoes around the state. Tampa avoided a direct hit.
item.dc:creator: TERRY SPENCER and KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Don’t expect hurricane ‘truth telling from anybody’: Bill O’Reilly
item.description: "Republicans and Donald Trump are trying to use a storm for political advantage, but so is Kamala Harris,” O'Reilly said.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Turkey's navy starts to evacuate its citizens from Beirut as Israel battles Hezbollah
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Over 2,000 Turkish citizens and some foreign nationals started boarding a Turkish military ship late Wednesday that brought in aid and will take them out of a country being hit by Israeli airstrikes targeting Hezbollah.
item.dc:creator: MEHMET GUZEL and ROBERT BADENDIECK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 20 lbs. of cocaine found in truck floorboard at South Texas port of entry
item.description: A truck driven by a U.S. citizen had over 20 pounds of cocaine hidden in the floorboards as it tried to enter the South Texas border from Mexico, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials said.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, WGN 9

item.title: Watch: Drone captures 28-foot wave inside Hurricane Milton
item.description: Drone footage captured a montrous wave in Hurricane Milton as the powerful storm passed through the Gulf of Mexico on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Polluted waste from Florida's fertilizer industry is in the path of Milton's fury
item.description: As Hurricane Milton pummeled Florida’s west coast with powerful winds and flooding rain, environmentalists worry it could scatter the polluted leftovers of the state’s phosphate fertilizer mining industry and other hazardous waste across the peninsula and into vulnerable waterways.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL BIESECKER and JASON DEAREN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brown rejects calls to divest from companies in connection with pro-Palestinian protests on campus
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Brown University has rejected a proposal to divest from 10 companies that protesters say were facilitating the Israeli occupation of Palestinian territory.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Taylor Swift donates $5 million to Hurricane Helene and Milton relief efforts
item.description: Taylor Swift donated $5 million to Feeding America’s disaster relief efforts for those affected by ­­Hurricane Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NASA video shows Hurricane Milton from space
item.description: Video taken from the International Space Station puts the massive size of Hurricane Milton into perspective.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Tropical dictionary: Words to know as active hurricane season continues
item.description: Let’s dive into some of the frequently used words and phrases that are on repeat during this busy week of hurricane season.
item.dc:creator: Alex Schneider, Fox 5

item.title: California sea lion dies after being shot; police hunt for gunman
item.description: A California sea lion was shot and killed by a gunman in Orange County Monday, according to the NOAA. The male was around 2 years old and was shot in the back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A federal judge will hear more evidence on whether to reopen voter registration in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — At least for now, a federal judge won’t order the state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Arizona Democratic Party office shared with Harris-Walz campaign shot at for third time in less than a month
item.description: The Arizona Democratic National Committee office in Tempe was targeted in a shooting over the weekend in the early morning hours, police said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: COVID may increase risk of heart attack, death years after infection: study
item.description: “This study underscores that we should consider history of prior COVID-19 infection when formulating cardiovascular disease preventive plans and goals,” said co-senior author Stanley Hazen.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Will we see northern lights, power grid impacts amid 'severe' geomagnetic storm?
item.description: Earth is being hit by a strong solar radiation storm event that will be followed by a geomagnetic storm, space weather officials say.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: COVID may increase risk of heart attack, death years after infection: study
item.description: COVID-19 could increase the risk of major cardiac events, like strokes and heart attacks, or death from any cause, according to a new study.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: When is an interview too tough? CBS News grappling with question after Dokoupil interview
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — An internal debate over CBS News host Tony Dokoupil's pointed interview with author Ta-Nehisi Coates about Israel has spread to the boardroom, with the chief of the network's parent company saying Wednesday that it was a mistake to reprimand him.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's 'God Bless the USA' Bibles printed in China, records show
item.description: Thousands of copies of former President Trump's "God Bless the USA" Bible were printed in China, according to trade records.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Accused Idaho college killer Bryan Kohberger's trial date pushed back
item.description: The trial of Bryan Kohberger, who is accused of killing four University of Idaho students in 2022, has been pushed from June 2025 to August 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tampa's 'Lt. Dan' says he's riding out Hurricane Milton on boat despite mayor's warning
item.description: A Tampa man who goes by the nickname "Lt. Dan" has caused a flurry of online concern for his safety during Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, Fox 5

item.title: Nazi-looted Monet, missing for over 80 years, returned to heirs of original owners in New Orleans: FBI
item.description: A Monet artwork believed to have been lost during Nazi occupation in WWII has been returned to its rightful owners after a lengthy investigation spanning decades and continents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mama bear defeats rival that killed her cub to win Fat Bear Week 2024
item.description: The brown bears truly ate this year, and we mean they ate a lot of salmon at Katmai National Park and Preserve.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Parsons, ABC 4

item.title: Mama bear defeats rival that killed her cub to win Fat Bear Week 2024
item.description: The brown bears truly ate this year, and we mean they ate a lot of salmon at Katmai National Park and Preserve.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Parsons, KRON4

item.title: A retired Houston officer gets 60 years in a couple's drug raid deaths that revealed corruption
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — A former Houston police officer was sentenced to 60 years in prison on Tuesday for the murder of a married couple during a drug raid that revealed systemic corruption in the department’s narcotics unit and prompted criticism of the law enforcement agency and its tactics.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Why do people fill their bathtubs with water before a hurricane?
item.description: If you live in a hurricane-prone area, it may be common practice for you. If you live well outside that region, you may be confused by the move.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Milton's storm surge is a threat that could be devastating far beyond the Tampa Bay region
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Two weeks ago, Hurricane Helene “spared” the Tampa Bay region a direct hit and yet storm surge still caused catastrophic damage, flooding homes, drowning people who decided to stay near the coast and leaving massive piles of debris that still sit along roadsides.
item.dc:creator: BRENDAN FARRINGTON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: West Virginia woman met her husband after getting donor lungs from his late sister
item.description: A woman from West Virginia got a new chance at life and found the love of her life thanks to organ donation.
item.dc:creator: Sam Kirk, KRON4

item.title: U.S. Postal Service announces recommended 2024 holiday shipping dates
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service announced its recommended mailing and shipping dates on Tuesday for the 2024 holiday season. The following list shows the latest recommended dates for a package sent to an address in the contiguous United States to be delivered by Dec.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump campaign blasts Bob Woodward; denies secret Putin calls
item.description: Donald Trump's campaign is rejecting claims in Bob Woodward's new book 'War' about the former president holding secret calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton is a Category 5. Florida orders evacuations and scrambles to clear Helene's debris
item.description: BELLEAIR BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Florida’s storm-battered Gulf Coast raced against a Category 5 hurricane Monday as workers sprinted to pick up debris left over from Helene two weeks ago and highways were clogged with people fleeing ahead of the storm.
item.dc:creator: HAVEN DALEY and MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Purple Whoppers are coming to Burger King for a limited time
item.description: Burger King is teaming up with Amazon MGM Studios to release a new menu inspired by The Addams Family. The Addams Family Menu includes four items that will be inspired by an Addams family member, according to the burger chain.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Colleges brace for Oct. 7 anniversary
item.description: Colleges face a major test Monday as pro-Palestinian and pro-Israel students both hold events for the first anniversary of Hamas’s attack on Israel.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5
